---
applyTo: "docs/**"
---

# Chrome Web Store compliance & privacy docs
- All user-facing behavior must be disclosed accurately.
- Privacy-related disclosures must match actual behavior.
- If personal/sensitive data is accessed, include:
  - What is collected
  - Why it is needed
  - How it is used/shared
  - Retention and user controls
  - Limited-use style disclosure where applicable
